case_title: NASIR PATEL VS. EDDIE BERNARD COLLIER

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CALLIER, EDDIE (SUED AS EDDIE BERNARD COLLIER) HEARING SET FOR JUL-21-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT COLLIER, EDDIE BERNARD SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT EDDIE CALLIER'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-21-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
